title: dalbergia altissima
intro: Dalbergia altissima, also known as the Mountain Ebony or Philippine Ebony, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dalbergia altissima include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, while also exhibiting potential anticancer and antioxidant activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction, infusion, or poultice, with the bark and roots being commonly used for medicinal purposes.
